scripts.build: vite build && npm run build:btech && npm run build:mba && npm run build:law
scripts.build:mba: npm install --prefix Shobhit-University-MBA-Landing-Page--main && npm run build --prefix Shobhit-University-MBA-Landing-Page--main
scripts.build:law: npm install --prefix Shobhit-University-Law-Landing-Page-main && npm run build --prefix Shobhit-University-Law-Landing-Page-main
scripts.lint: tsc --noEmit && npm run lint --prefix Shobhit-University-B.Tech-Landing-Page-main && npm run lint --prefix Shobhit-University-MBA-Landing-Page--main && npm run lint --prefix Shobhit-University-Law-Landing-Page-main
